title: Astro Component
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries Astro component files, which combine a frontmatter script block (TypeScript/JavaScript), HTML-like templating, and optional client-side component islands from any supported UI framework (React, Vue, Svelte, Solid). Astro targets high-performance static and server-rendered websites.

## When to use
Use `media:astro;textable;code` when a pipeline node processes `.astro` files — for example, a build step invoking the Astro CLI, a component analysis tool, or an LLM node generating Astro page templates.

## Notes
Astro's component model renders to HTML by default with zero JavaScript shipped unless an explicit `client:*` directive is used. The `.astro` file format is specific to the Astro framework and requires the Astro compiler for transformation. See also [Astro Component](https://capdag.com/browse/media:astro;textable;code).
